---
name: Spec proposal
about: Propose a change or addition to the AMP protocol specification
title: '[PROPOSAL] '
labels: proposal
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

One-paragraph description of what you are proposing.

## Motivation

What problem does this solve? What is the use case? Why can't existing
protocol mechanisms address it?

## Detailed Design

How would this work concretely? Wire format, headers, body schemas,
trust implications, compliance implications.

## Backwards Compatibility

Does this break existing implementations? If so, what's the migration path?

## Alternatives Considered

What else did you consider? Why this approach?

## Open Questions

What's still undecided?
